body:
## Summary
- Adds a machine-readable `ebook__footnote-list` to static ebook chapter footnotes.
- Adds hidden per-source `data-source-key` rows so browser checks can verify chapter source-mix badge counts from rendered DOM.
- Updates static ebook parity and Playwright provenance checks to assert the shipped footnote IDs, source labels, and backlink hashes.

## Validation
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules node --test tests/content-static-site-ebook-parity.test.js`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules npm run validate:content -- --focus-static-ebook-provenance`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules node --test scripts/static-site-source-provenance-copy.test.js`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules npx playwright test tests/e2e/static-ebook-provenance.spec.ts --reporter=line`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules npm run test:ownership`
- `node --check site/ebook.js && git diff --check`
title: ebook: expose footnote source count metadata
